title: Notifications -  Update Available OFF
scenario: No device software update notification appears when notification is disabled in App Settings and app is in background after pairing a device with outdated firmware
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Navigate to App Settings → General → Notifications & Device Alerts.
3. Locate the 'Device Software Update' notification toggle and set it to OFF.
4. Press the Home button or switch to another app to send the Poly Studio Mobile app to the background.
5. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device with a firmware version lower than the current version available on the cloud server is powered off.
6. Put the device into pairing mode (e.g., press and hold the Bluetooth button).
7. On the mobile device, go to Bluetooth settings and pair the device.
8. Observe whether any 'Device Software Update' notification appears on the mobile device's notification shade or lock screen.
expected: No 'Device Software Update' notification appears on the mobile device after pairing, since the notification is disabled in app settings.
